trigger: Repeated missed references and broken links during multi-file updates
baseline: Ad-hoc multi-file editing without a pre-flight checklist; steps remembered from memory
mutation: Add a pre-flight checklist before file edits
notes: Checklist included: dependency map, grep for anchors, run local link-check, update sidebar. Two fewer errors and 5-minute faster review turnaround.

trigger: Reviewer flagged inconsistent headings across edited files last run
baseline: Same as prior baseline: no checklist, edits done file-by-file
mutation: Add a pre-flight checklist before file edits
notes: Pre-flight checklist caught missing nav update and duplicate H1 issues before PR. Substantial time saved in back-and-forth with reviewer.

trigger: Broken cross-repo link discovered post-merge in previous cycle
baseline: No checklist; relied on CI to catch link issues
mutation: Add a pre-flight checklist before file edits
notes: Checklist step 'run link-check locally' found two 404s; fixed prior to PR. Zero reviewer-found issues.

trigger: Recurring nit fixes and missed sidebar entries slowing approvals
baseline: No explicit pre-flight; relied on memory and CI hints
mutation: Add a pre-flight checklist before file edits
notes: Checklist verified sidebar updates and anchor consistency. Only one minor style nit from reviewer; merge approved first round.

trigger: Desire to reduce cycle time further by pushing changes faster
baseline: Single-threaded edits and commits per file group
mutation: Enable aggressive parallel commits across files
notes: Parallel commits caused merge conflicts, partial link-check runs, and a rollback. Net slower and more error-prone; reviewers requested revert.

trigger: Late discovery of broken links during PR review
baseline: Run link-check only in CI post-PR
notes: Earlier link-check caught some issues sooner but produced false positives for anchors in generated pages, causing local delays without net error reduction.
